service.name: AI Humanizer Suite
service.category: Writing Productivity Tools > AI Text Rewriting and Detection
service.description: A free online suite of six bilingual (English / Chinese) AI text tools. Includes a generic AI humanizer, a student-essay-tuned humanizer, a Turnitin-specific bypass, a Walter Writes style rewriter, an AI content detector, and a Chinese AI rate reducer.
service.service_type: Software as a Service (SaaS) — Free, browser-based, no installation

capabilities.name: AI text humanization
capabilities.description: Rewrite AI-generated text so it reads like a human wrote it.

capabilities.name: Essay humanization
capabilities.description: Rewrite student essays in authentic student voice. Preserves thesis, citations, dates, numbers.

capabilities.name: Turnitin AI bypass
capabilities.description: Specifically engineered against Turnitin's AI detection signals.

capabilities.name: Walter Writes style rewriting
capabilities.description: Rewrite AI text in the natural Walter Writes style — short paragraphs, conversational, parenthetical asides, second person, direct opinions.

capabilities.name: Chinese AI rate reduction
capabilities.description: Rewrites Chinese AI boilerplate vocabulary (赋能, 抓手, 底层逻辑, 链路, 生态位, 范式, 价值闭环, 降维打击) into natural Chinese prose. Calibrated against 知网 (CNKI), 维普 (CQVIP), GPTZero Chinese, ZeroGPT Chinese.

capabilities.name: AI content detection
capabilities.description: Detect if text is AI-generated. Returns structured JSON with AI probability score, verdict, and 5 specific detection signals.
capabilities.output: object — { ai_probability: number, human_probability: number, verdict: string, signals: string[], explanation: string }

advanced_capabilities: Preserve citations, dates, proper nouns, numbers
Detect AI-generated content with signal-level explainability

output_constraints.format: UTF-8 text (for all rewriting modes) or JSON (for detector mode only)

api_examples.curl_essay_humanizer: curl -X POST https://gpt-undetectable.com/api/humanize -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text":"Your AI text here","lang":"en","mode":"essay"}'
api_examples.curl_detector: curl -X POST https://gpt-undetectable.com/api/humanize -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text":"Text to analyze","lang":"en","mode":"detector"}'
api_examples.curl_chinese_rate_reducer: curl -X POST https://gpt-undetectable.com/api/humanize -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text":"在当今数字化转型的时代背景下","lang":"zh","mode":"chinese"}'
